entity.label: Ataroth
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A city east of Jordan, not far from Gilead (Num. 32:3).

nodes.label: Ataroth
nodes.description: A city east of Jordan, not far from Gilead (Num. 32:3).

verses.text: Ataroth, and Dibon, and Jazer, and Nimrah, and Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Shebam, and Nebo, and Beon,
And the children of Gad built Dibon, and Ataroth, and Aroer,
